name: tsrun-toolkit
description: Dev workflow skills (fix-types, doc, clone-website) with Obsidian MCP integration.

obsidian_api_key.title: Obsidian API Key
obsidian_api_key.description: Obsidian Local REST API key (from plugin settings)

hooks.command: cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" && git rev-parse --git-dir >/dev/null 2>&1 && [ -n "$(git status --porcelain)" ] && git add -A && MSG=$(git diff --cached --stat | claude -p 'Write a one-line git commit message for these changes. Format: [TYPE] message. TYPE is one of: ADD, UPDATE, FIX, REMOVE. English only. No quotes. Just the message line, nothing else.' 2>/dev/null) && [ -n "$MSG" ] && git commit -m "$MSG" && git push || true
